amplitude_metadata.notes: Legacy Mar-30th-2026 segmented estimate used +0.77 pitch; Apr-8th-2026 analyzer recommendation is +1.00 normalized and now adopted for protocol runs.
Calibrated from Mar-30th-2026 Airdata rc_aileron(percent) clean plateaus; recommended +1.00 normalized roll.
No clean Mar-30th-2026 lateral_left segment in Airdata; mirrored from lateral_right magnitude to preserve protocol symmetry (-1.00 roll).
Calibrated from Mar-30th-2026 Airdata rc_throttle(percent) climb segments; plateau median supports +1.00 normalized throttle.
Calibrated from Mar-30th-2026 Airdata rc_throttle(percent) descent segments; plateau median supports -1.00 normalized throttle.
Calibrated from Mar-30th-2026 Airdata rc_rudder(percent) clean plateaus; recommended +1.00 normalized yaw.
Calibrated from Mar-30th-2026 Airdata rc_rudder(percent) clean left-yaw plateaus; recommended -1.00 normalized yaw.
Matches climb amplitude (+1.0 throttle) with 2.5s hold to test vertical slew/protocol limitation.
Matches descent amplitude (-1.0 throttle) with 2.5s hold to test vertical slew/protocol limitation.
